about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm a frontend developer focused on building modern, responsive, and user-friendly web applications. I have hands-on experience with Angular, React, and JavaScript, and I enjoy collaborating with teams to deliver clean, high-quality solutions. I'm always learning, sharing through GitHub, and finding new ways to create meaningful digital experiences.

projects.name: Angular Portfolio
projects.description: A dynamic portfolio built using Angular and GitHub API to showcase repositories and contributions.

projects.name: Ang RSS Reader
projects.description: An RSS reader app built with Angular and Feedbox to aggregate tech feeds in a simple interface.
